criteria.name: AI-Powered Personalization
criteria.description: The app utilizes AI algorithms to provide personalized financial advice, insights, and recommendations tailored to individual user profiles and financial goals.

criteria.name: Automated Savings/Investment
criteria.description: The app automates savings or investment processes using AI, such as rounding up transactions, optimizing portfolios, or rebalancing assets.

criteria.name: Expense Tracking and Budgeting
criteria.description: The app uses AI to automatically track expenses, categorize transactions, and provide smart budgeting suggestions to help users manage their spending.

criteria.name: Financial Forecasting and Analysis
criteria.description: The app employs AI to forecast financial trends, analyze market behavior, and provide users with data-driven insights for better decision-making.

criteria.name: Risk Management
criteria.description: The app incorporates AI-powered tools to help users assess and manage financial risks, ensuring compliance and mitigating potential losses.
